examples.title: Algorithm: Pointer Basics
examples.description: Demonstrates pointer declaration, initialization, and dereferencing
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PointerBasics
INPUT: none
OUTPUT: none

BEGIN
 DECLARE ptr AS POINTER TO INTEGER
 DECLARE num AS INTEGER
 SET num TO 10
 SET ptr TO ADDRESS OF num
 PRINT "Value at ptr: " + DEREFERENCE(ptr)
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic concepts of pointers, including declaration, initialization, and dereferencing.
